senior_junior_culture.summary: Student groups and hall life create opportunities for mentoring and batch interaction, but the available sources are not sufficiently independent or numerous for a campus-wide conclusion.
positive_themes: Clubs and teams enable cross-batch interaction
Student media and technical teams create peer-learning channels
negative_themes: Selection and hierarchy experiences are not consistently documented

academic_culture.summary: Official sources show broad curricular flexibility, minors, exchange and external project options. Student-media evidence also reports workload and administrative concerns; intensity varies by programme.
negative_themes: Workload and academic pressure are reported

hostel_reality.summary: Official sources confirm residential bhawans, Wi-Fi and mess infrastructure. Student-media reports identify time-specific construction, connectivity and rule concerns, so current conditions require direct verification.
negative_themes: Infrastructure and rule experiences can vary by bhawan

club_and_campus_life.summary: The institute has a large technical, cultural, festival, sports and service ecosystem, with recent technical-team evidence. First-year access and selection processes vary by group.
negative_themes: Not every directory listing has recent dated evidence

coding_and_placement_culture.summary: Official reports show substantial software, analytics, electronics and core recruitment and hundreds of internships. Student accounts indicate active preparation, while detailed company-role transparency remains incomplete.
negative_themes: Company-level eligibility and outcomes are not fully public

locality_and_student_life.summary: The self-contained campus is well connected by rail and road, with Haridwar and Dehradun nearby. It is not embedded in a major metropolitan technology hub, so spontaneous city-industry access is comparatively limited.
negative_themes: Distance from major metro startup ecosystems

overall_satisfaction.summary: Evidence supports strong academic, technical and extracurricular opportunity, but hostel, mess, workload and process experiences vary. No numeric satisfaction score is justified.
